economic_ownership_map.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Secondary cash ~USD 100M / 147.9M shares (~$0.68). YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements. SEDAR annual pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Present cash available to common after near-term legal/G&A burn; no award receivable booked.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Liquidity, FX, and placement dilution bracket the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: SEDAR cash balance or going-concern burn shows cash floor below the low case after legal spend.

economic_ownership_map.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 unpaid award ~$1.18bn face; Delaware attached judgment / CITGO sale path; net after CVR 5.466% and bonus-plan leakage. Base aligns with four-year dated payoff ~$7 including cash.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Risked present value of net award collections only; cash remains separate.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Base assumes ~4 years to meaningful net cash; bear embeds longer or failed closing.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Analyst judgment pending Amber closing and creditor waterfall; base embeds partial recovery over ~4 years.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining legal spend and senior claims are partly in the reserve component and partly netted in recovery.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability, timing, OFAC/closing, creditor ranking, CVR, and bonus plan are inside the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Amber sale closes with de minimis net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors, or OFAC/closing permanently blocks distribution.

economic_ownership_map.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Arb II RFA pleadings claim large incremental damages; base zero until tribunal path and collectibility clearer. High case is bull-only optionality.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Incremental option only; does not double-count ICSID/CITGO recovery.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Multi-year arbitration timing; not in the four-year base payoff.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base success probability treated as ~0 until clearer tribunal path; high case is bull optionality.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No additional owner-funded mine capital modeled; legal spend covered in reserve/cash burn.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Base zero; high case is success-path optionality only.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Tribunal dismisses Arb II or collectibility collapses so high-case optionality is not supportable.

economic_ownership_map.label: Legal burn and senior-claim reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Ongoing litigation spend and ranking risk versus other attached judgment creditors on CITGO proceeds.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Deduction for spend and priority leakage not already netted in the risked recovery line.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Negative additive; does not double-count CVR already netted in recovery.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Creditor waterfall or burn rate shows a larger structural haircut than the low case.

facts.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
facts.evidence: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 unpaid award ~$1.18bn face; Delaware attached judgment / CITGO sale path; net after CVR 5.466% and bonus-plan leakage. Base aligns with four-year dated payoff ~$7 including cash.

facts.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
facts.evidence: Arb II RFA pleadings claim large incremental damages; base zero until tribunal path and collectibility clearer. High case is bull-only optionality.

judgments.evidence: Secondary cash ~USD 100M / 147.9M shares (~$0.68). YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements. SEDAR annual pending [HUMAN REVIEW].

judgments.evidence: Ongoing litigation spend and ranking risk versus other attached judgment creditors on CITGO proceeds.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Present cash available to common after near-term legal/G&A burn; no award receivable booked.

top_value_drivers.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Risked present value of net award collections only; cash remains separate.

top_value_drivers.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Incremental option only; does not double-count ICSID/CITGO recovery.

top_value_drivers.label: Legal burn and senior-claim reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Deduction for spend and priority leakage not already netted in the risked recovery line.

blockers: arb_ii_option: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
corporate_cash: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
legal_burn_and_senior_claims_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
risked_award_citgo_recovery: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

falsifiers: SEDAR cash balance or going-concern burn shows cash floor below the low case after legal spend.
Amber sale closes with de minimis net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors, or OFAC/closing permanently blocks distribution.
Tribunal dismisses Arb II or collectibility collapses so high-case optionality is not supportable.
Creditor waterfall or burn rate shows a larger structural haircut than the low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
